description_long: This is a highly muscular adult male figure with exaggerated anatomical definition, featuring prominent, well-defined muscles across the chest, arms, and legs. The figure is depicted with a youthful, athletic build and stands upright with arms slightly outstretched. He is wearing short athletic shorts and has white athletic tape or bandages wrapped around his wrists and ankles. The head is adorned with a full head of tousled, medium-length hair. The skin surface is smooth with visible shading to accentuate muscle tone. No accessories or carried objects are present, and the figure is barefoot.
description: A highly muscular adult male with athletic shorts, wrist and ankle wraps, and tousled hair, standing upright and barefoot.
description_view_0: Front view shows the detailed musculature of the chest, abdomen, and arms, as well as the facial features and front of the shorts.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the torso, arm, and leg muscles, and the side of the head and shorts.
description_view_2: Back view displays the broad, muscular back, shoulders, and legs, as well as the rear of the shorts and hair.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile of the body, arm, and leg muscles, and the side of the head.
attribute_clothing_type: athletic shorts with wrist and ankle wraps
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
